lastSession.summary: Logo mark size increased in nav from 44→56px. Logo/favicon set also replaced with LE serif monogram mark this session.

backlog.title: Google Search Console setup for lexeu.ai
backlog.desc: Add verification token to layout.tsx metadata.verification.google, submit sitemap at https://www.lexeu.ai/sitemap.xml

backlog.title: Connect custom domain lexeu.ai to Vercel
backlog.desc: Vercel → Settings → Domains → add lexeu.ai and www.lexeu.ai. Update DNS at registrar.

backlog.title: Add analytics
backlog.desc: Vercel Analytics or Google Analytics. Skip for now.

backlog.title: Create privacy policy page
backlog.desc: Footer links to /privacy/ but page doesn't exist yet. Needs English content for Privacy Policy (GDPR-compliant, EU audience).

backlog.title: Create Terms of Use and Cookie Policy pages
backlog.desc: Footer links to /terms/ and /cookies/ but pages don't exist yet. Needs English content.

backlog.title: Populate MediaMentions section when EU press coverage exists
backlog.desc: MediaMentions component removed from homepage — no EU press yet. Re-add to page.tsx once real English-language press articles are available. Each entry needs: outlet name, article title, short description, URL, favicon.

backlog.title: Replace demo video with EU law example
backlog.desc: Current demo.webm/mp4 shows an AI Krpan Slovenian law session. Needs a new recording showing LexEU answering an EU law question (e.g. GDPR or employment directive).

backlog.title: Replace placeholder testimonials with real ones
backlog.desc: Current testimonials (Koller & Wirth, NovaTech, Studio Ferretti) are representative placeholders per the content brief. Replace with real user quotes as they come in.

backlog.title: next lint fails with spaces in project path
backlog.desc: next lint parses path incorrectly when working dir contains spaces (iCloud Drive). Works fine on Vercel. Low priority — only affects local DX.

shipped: Logo/favicon set: LE serif monogram mark across all sizes (favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon, android-chrome 192/512, logo-96/256, mstile). 40–50% smaller files.
Full English EU law content: all homepage sections translated and adapted from AI Krpan (Slovenian) to LexEU (EU-wide). Founder + MediaMentions removed. Pricing simplified to 2 plans.
/dedovanje/ hub page: full content (dedni redi, oporoka, nujni delež, zapuščinski postopek, FAQ, schema)
Pricing: Po meri CTA shortened to 'Pišite nam →' (single line, consistent button height)
/pogodbe/ hub page: full content (7 contract types, neveljavnost, FAQ, AI KRPAN CTAs, schema markup)
/pogodbe/kupoprodajna-pogodba/: full sub-page (OZ 435-527, avto VIN checklist, notar, davki, FAQ)
Footer: fixed attribution to 'Izdelala Futuristica' (correct Slovenian grammar, removed d.o.o.)
MediaMentions: inline 32x32 favicons next to outlet name, removed bordered thumbnail boxes
Models: unified category badge colors to warm accent (bg-warm-pale text-[#8A6040])
Color scheme migration: sage green → warm accent (#BF7A3B) with dark primary (#2A2520) across all components
